overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character in a futuristic suit navigating dark industrial corridors and stairwells with red emergency lighting, eventually entering a large circular chamber where they discover a body near an airlock door.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with metal grating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark industrial corridors with metal railings and red warning lights

metal safety railings lining the walkway

metal mesh security gate with warning signage

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a dark, narrow industrial corridor with metal grating floors and safety railings. Red emergency lights provide the primary illumination as the character walks past security gates and ventilation grilles.

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending metal stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the industrial stairwell past B1 level markers and metal railings

large yellow B1 signage indicating lower levels
metal staircase with grated steps ascending upward
exposed pipes and conduits running along stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow industrial stairwell marked with B1 level signage. Metal stairs and exposed piping line the walls as the character climbs toward the upper level doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular chamber with red neon floor lighting

events.description: character enters large circular room with intense red neon floor lighting and central tree structure
character transitions from walking to running across the circular chamber

agents.ego_description: running across the expansive red-lit circular room toward the airlock door on the far side

entered.detail: large circular room with high ceilings and industrial architecture
glowing red neon strips embedded in the floor forming circular patterns
large tree-like structure or sculpture in the chamber center
heavy industrial airlock door with circular locking mechanism

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dramatic circular chamber illuminated by intense red neon floor lighting. A large tree-like structure stands in the center as the character runs across the room toward a heavy airlock door on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock corridor with body discovery site

events.description: character interacts with airlock door control panel attempting to open it
character discovers dead body slumped against wall near the door

agents.ego_description: examining the airlock door controls then discovering and closely inspecting a dead body on the ground

notable_agents.action: dead body slumped against wall wearing dark hooded clothing

entered.detail: illuminated control interface next to the airlock door
scattered debris and equipment on the floor near the body
industrial wall paneling with warning signs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the airlock door and attempts to interact with the control panel. After the door fails to open, the character discovers a dead body slumped against the wall nearby and kneels down to examine it closely in the red-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial complex that opens into a vast, ominous chamber. It begins in a dark, narrow corridor where the character navigates metal grating and security gates under the glow of red emergency lights. As the character moves forward, the path shifts upward into a narrow stairwell lined with exposed piping and B1 level signage. The scene then expands dramatically as the character enters a large circular chamber illuminated by intense red neon floor lighting, running past a central tree-like structure toward a heavy airlock door. Finally, the camera closes in as the character attempts to operate the door's control panel before kneeling to examine a dead body slumped against the wall.
